response.justification: While Bogdan brings substantial engineering experience and strong communication skills, he does not meet the role's mandatory technical requirements. His C++ experience is limited to a 6-month engagement 11 years ago, with no recent professional C++ work. He lacks demonstrated expertise in SQL Server/Oracle and has no capital markets, fixed-income, or investment-banking domain background. His career trajectory shows deep specialization in web technologies and backend systems, not the Windows-based C++ capital markets infrastructure this role demands.
strengths: 15+ years of professional software engineering experience with demonstrated expertise across multiple programming languages and platforms
Proven ability to communicate complex technical concepts through talks, workshops, and open-source projects with significant adoption
Strong track record implementing software engineering best practices including TDD, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure automation
concerns: C++ expertise is limited to a single 6-month role from 11 years ago with no recent professional C++ experience
No demonstrated expertise in SQL Server, Oracle, or database-intensive systems development required for capital markets
Complete absence of financial services, capital markets, fixed-income derivatives, or investment banking experience
